items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding recipient contact and channel.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Recipient contact + channel (email/SMS/link)', but the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to this requirement. While there are multiple prior steps that indicate successful bookings and member invitations, none of them explicitly validate the recipient's contact information or the communication channel used. This lack of direct evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
